title: Improve and consolidate standalone HTML/CSS/JS downloadable version

requirements.text: Ensure the standalone HTML/CSS/JS version of ByteMeal (located in frontend/standalone/) is complete, self-contained, and fully functional as a downloadable package. All pages — index.html (Home), donor-form.html, assistance-form.html, volunteer-form.html, food-listings.html, and dashboard.html — must be fully linked to the shared styles.css and script.js files using relative paths, so that the entire frontend/standalone/ folder can be downloaded and opened directly in a browser without any server, build tools, or framework.

quotes: mai css JavaScript HTML ka wala code he chahiye
Download mea pura download ho raha hu

acceptanceCriteria: All standalone HTML pages link correctly to styles.css and script.js via relative paths
Opening index.html directly in a browser (file:// protocol) renders the full ByteMeal home page with correct styles
Navigation links between all pages work correctly when the folder is opened locally
All form submissions (Donor, Assistance Request, Volunteer) store data to localStorage and show toast notifications
Food Listings page reads from localStorage and displays submitted donations as cards
Dashboard page shows live stats counted from localStorage entries
No React, Node.js, or build tool dependency exists in the standalone folder

requirements.text: Ensure the standalone styles.css comprehensively covers all pages with the ByteMeal Glassmorphism design system: Vibrant Orange (#FF6B2B) and Sky Blue (#38BDF8) accent colors, frosted-glass card styles (backdrop-filter: blur, semi-transparent backgrounds), smooth rounded corners, subtle box shadows, a dark food-themed gradient background on all pages, Inter font loaded from Google Fonts CDN, and full mobile/tablet/desktop responsiveness via CSS media queries.

quotes: css JavaScript HTML ka wala code he chahiye

acceptanceCriteria: styles.css imports Inter font from Google Fonts CDN
All glassmorphism card styles are present and applied across all pages
Orange and Sky Blue accent colors are used for buttons, badges, and highlights
Dark background with overlay is applied on all pages ensuring text readability
Responsive layouts work correctly at 375px (mobile), 768px (tablet), and 1280px (desktop) viewports

requirements.text: Ensure the standalone script.js file provides all shared JavaScript utilities needed across all pages: hamburger navigation toggle, toast notification display, localStorage read/write helpers for donations, assistance requests, and volunteer records, form validation helpers, and button loading state management. Each HTML page must include a script block that calls the appropriate functions for its own page logic (form submission, data rendering, stats counting).

quotes: css JavaScript HTML ka wala code he chahiye

acceptanceCriteria: script.js exports or defines globally accessible utility functions
Toast notifications appear correctly on form submission success
Form data is saved to localStorage on submission
Food Listings page dynamically renders donation cards from localStorage
Dashboard stats update to reflect current localStorage record counts
Hamburger menu opens and closes correctly on mobile

constraints: Do not modify any files outside of frontend/standalone/
Do not use React, TypeScript, or any build tools in the standalone version
All standalone pages must work when opened via the file:// protocol in a browser
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Adding new pages or features not already present in the existing standalone version
Integrating the standalone version with any backend or API
